alkylation reagent: Iodoacetamide (Sigma-Aldrich, I1149) was added to a final concentration of 50 mM
cleavage agent: After digestion with 0.3 μg trypsin (Promega V5113) for 2 h on a thermo shaker
enrichment method: SILAC or label-free nucleosome affinity purifications
instrument: SNAP samples were processed and analysed by LC–MS on a Q-Exactive mass spectrometer
labeling: SILAC-labelled nuclear extracts were prepared from HeLa S3 cells
